title: Anesty Torx Key Set 9pcs T10-T50 Security Tamperproof Torx Star Key Set Cr-V Steel Made, Colour Coded Long L Shape Star Keys
features: ✔️ 【Versatile Sizes】 9pc Long Torx key Set with sizes: T10, T15, T20, T25, T27, T30, T40, T45, T50. All of torx star keys are kept securely in a foldable holer with clip
✔️【Premium Material】 Manufactured from high-grade Chrome Vanadium Steel with chrome mirror finish.
✔️【Torx Key Hollow Point Design】Torx L-Keys set is suitable for standard Torx screws as well as Torx tamper proof security screws.
✔️ 【Colour-coded】 The multicolor L-shape torx keys provides extra comfort in use and easy to quickly identify the correct size
✔️ The 9pcs star wrench set is good for bicycle repair,furniture assembly,appliance repair,household DIY,etc.
description: Product Description 9PCS Anti-Slip Tamperproof Torx Star Keys ,Heat Treated CRV Steel Made The tamperproof torx sets are special designed for tighten/loosen standard Torx screws and Torx tamper proof security screws. Premium CRV Steel Made from heat-treated 6150 CRV steel for higher hardness, greater torque, and wear-resistance 90° Right Angle Bend Star key set is formed once, 90° right angle bending and not easily deformed Fast Identification Torx wrenches are colour coded and size marked on a polished and chrome-plated surface for easy identification and durability Easy to Carry The torx key sets are well organized in a wear-free folder ,which makes easy removal and a secure hold of the torx set screwdriver Hallow Design for Tamper Proof Screw The Tamper Proof Torx Keys come with security star ends, allowing you to tighten or loosen not only regular Torx screws but also those tricky Torx tamper-proof security screws. Each Torx key wrench has chamfered edges on the short and long arm, make you locate easily and guide the torx keys into fixings effectively
